chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2405 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application 21.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Naeem Khan, Advocate for Applicant a/w Applicant Mr. Muhammad Noonari, Asstt: Prosecutor General, Sindh ************ Learned Counsel for the Applicant submits that the Applicant has been acquitted by the learned Trial Court; hence, he does not press this Criminal Bail Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Qurban
